disputed_language: Simplify policy management and troubleshooting for accounts with a common security-control baseline.
explanation: The recommendation's decision criterion expressly relies on simplifying troubleshooting, but its exact premise clm-b-ou-control-guidance revision 1 contains the separately recorded source mismatch. Because derived recommendations must be verified against every exact premise digest, this recommendation cannot receive a verified disposition over its current premise graph even though its general OU-level recommendation is consistent with AWS guidance.
required_action: After correcting and reverifying clm-b-ou-control-guidance, create a new recommendation revision that references the corrected exact premise digest, then reverify the complete derivation and decision criterion.

supporting_source.locator: Apply security controls to OUs rather than accounts
supporting_source.title: Design principles for your multi-account strategy
